description: You are a marine spatial ecologist preparing for a field season at the Charles Darwin Research Station in the Galapagos. Configure GPredict to track the Argos satellite network over the Pacific Ocean. Install the custom map files ocean_bathymetry.png and ocean_bathymetry.info from /workspace/data/ to the GPredict user maps directory (~/.config/Gpredict/maps/) and set "Ocean Bathymetry" as the default map with grid lines disabled. Create a ground station named 'Galapagos_CDRS' (0.7420° S, 90.3139° W, 10m altitude) and set it as the default ground station. Create a tracking module named 'Argos_Network' containing the following satellites: NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), METOP-C (43689), and SARAL (39086). Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
